findings.description: Missing professional seal and signature image.
findings.evidence: The PDF contains a blue professional engineer's seal and a signature on the bottom right of the page, which are entirely absent in the HTML rendering.
The PDF displays an aerial map with labeled sampling locations for Figure 1. The HTML completely omits this image, leaving only the extracted text from the legend and caption.

The PDF contains a complex flowchart with logical decision diamonds and processes. The HTML entirely misses the graphic and simply lists the text from within the flowchart shapes as disjointed plain text paragraphs.
The PDF features a flowchart diagram for Figure 3. Similar to Figure 2, the HTML fails to include the graphic, presenting only the unformatted text extracted from the diagram's elements.
